purpose: D-ML input for experiment g8 (HS8 Lean-minting viability). The random 1,000-declaration Mathlib sample = the null denominator for the fragment-gate primary endpoint (registry/experiments/g8.json).

sampling_algorithm.description: Deterministic uniform-random sample without replacement over the Mathlib-proper declaration set, realised by a SHA-256 keyed sort (repo convention: SHA-256 over fixed labels only). For each fully-qualified declaration name N, key(N)=sha256(seed_label + '\x00' + N) as lowercase hex; rank all Mathlib-proper names by key ascending; take the first 1000.
sampling_algorithm.population: Mathlib-proper declarations = every entry of declaration-data.bmp['declarations'] whose docLink begins './Mathlib/' (module page under Mathlib/).

enumeration_index.content_type: image/bmp (served for compression; content is plain JSON)
enumeration_index.note: 66 MB enumeration index; NOT byte-archived in-repo (size). The sha256 + the mathlib commit in every extracted record's gh_link are the content pins; the daily doc-gen4 build rotates the URL in place.
